# PERF-054 positive: strings.Builder{} allocated on a hot path
lang: go
file: PERF-054-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "strings"

func EncodePath(segments []string) string {
	var b = strings.Builder{}
	for _, seg := range segments {
		b.WriteString(seg)
		b.WriteString("/")
	}
	return b.String()
}
